overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a morning walk through a Los Santos residential neighborhood. The camera moves from a narrow back alley with utility poles and tire tracks, through an upscale residential area with modern mansions, and emerges onto a main sidewalk with pedestrians and a view of a tall art deco hotel building.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow residential back alley with tire tracks and utility poles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a narrow alley between a beige apartment building and a concrete retaining wall

entered.detail: wooden utility pole with multiple crossbars and overhead wires
tall palm tree with green fronds against the sky
multi-story beige apartment building with balconies
tall concrete retaining wall running along the right side
multiple black power lines crisscrossing between poles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow urban alley with tire tracks on the asphalt. A beige apartment building lines the left side while a concrete wall runs along the right. Utility poles with overhead wires dominate the center of the frame as the camera walks forward through this enclosed residential back street.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale residential street with modern mansions and landscaped lawns

events.description: exits narrow alley into wider residential area with manicured lawns and modern architecture

agents.ego_description: continuing uphill past green dumpsters toward modern residential buildings with garages

entered.detail: two green waste dumpsters positioned beside the building
large modern gray residence with underground garage entrance
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the property

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up into an upscale residential neighborhood. Green dumpsters appear on the left as the camera passes modern mansions with manicured lawns. The utility poles recede to the right as the path widens, revealing tall cypress trees and a distant view of a high-rise building.

scene_state.functional_zone: main residential boulevard with sidewalk and distant pedestrians

events.description: white sports car drives past on the right side of the street
camera turns slightly left to approach pedestrians and view the tall building

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching a group of pedestrians and looking up at the tall art deco building

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete pedestrian walkway with grass median to the right
modern street lamp on a curved pole
tall white art deco style building with vertical windows and setbacks
large palm tree with dense fronds

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto a main residential boulevard with a concrete sidewalk. A white sports car passes by on the street as pedestrians appear in the distance. The camera approaches the pedestrians and tilts upward to reveal a prominent tall art deco hotel building dominating the skyline, surrounded by palm trees and well-kept lawns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined urban alleyway that gradually opens into a luxurious residential boulevard. It begins by walking forward through a narrow back street lined by a beige apartment building and a concrete wall, with overhead utility wires dominating the enclosed space. As the path widens, the environment shifts into an upscale neighborhood where the alley gives way to modern mansions, manicured lawns, and tall cypress trees. The scene then expands onto a main concrete sidewalk as a white sports car passes by and pedestrians appear in the distance. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal a prominent art deco hotel building towering over the skyline amidst a landscape of palm trees.
